en: Draw near, O nations, to hear, and give attention, O peoples! Let the earth hear, and all that fills it; the world, and all that comes from it.
zh: 列國啊，要近前來聽！眾民哪，要留心聽！ 地和地上所充滿的，世界和其中所出的一切，都要聽！

en: For the LORD is enraged against all the nations, and furious against all their host; he has devoted them to destruction, has given them over for slaughter.
zh: 因為耶和華向列國發怒， 向他們所有的軍隊發烈怒， 要把他們滅盡， 要把他們交出來受屠殺。

en: Their slain shall be cast out, and the stench of their corpses shall rise; the mountains shall flow with their blood.
zh: 他們被殺的必被拋棄在外面， 屍體的臭氣上騰， 眾山都被他們的血所溶化。

en: All the host of heaven shall rot away, and the skies roll up like a scroll. All their host shall fall, as leaves fall from the vine, like leaves falling from the fig tree.
zh: 天上的萬象都必消殘； 天也像書卷一般被捲起， 所有星宿也必衰殘， 像葡萄樹的葉子衰殘一樣， 又像無花果樹的葉子凋落一樣。

en: For my sword has drunk its fill in the heavens; behold, it descends for judgment upon Edom, upon the people I have devoted to destruction.
zh: 因為我的刀在天上已經喝足了， 看哪！它要落在以東， 以及我決定要滅絕的民身上，為要施行審判。

en: The LORD has a sword; it is sated with blood; it is gorged with fat, with the blood of lambs and goats, with the fat of the kidneys of rams. For the LORD has a sacrifice in Bozrah, a great slaughter in the land of Edom.
zh: 耶和華的刀染滿了血， 這刀因脂肪、羊羔和公山羊的血， 以及公綿羊腰子的脂肪而滋潤， 因為耶和華在波斯拉有殺牲獻祭的事， 在以東地有大屠殺。

en: Wild oxen shall fall with them, and young steers with the mighty bulls. Their land shall drink its fill of blood, and their soil shall be gorged with fat.
zh: 野牛、牛犢與壯牛要與他們一同倒下， 他們的地喝足了血， 他們的塵土因脂肪而肥潤。

en: For the LORD has a day of vengeance, a year of recompense for the cause of Zion.
zh: 因為耶和華有報仇的日子， 為錫安的案件，必有報應之年。

en: And the streams of Edom shall be turned into pitch, and her soil into sulfur; her land shall become burning pitch.
zh: 以東的河水都要變成石油， 它的塵土必變成硫磺， 它的地土要變成燒著的石油，

en: Night and day it shall not be quenched; its smoke shall go up forever. From generation to generation it shall lie waste; none shall pass through it forever and ever.
zh: 晝夜不熄， 煙氣永遠上騰， 並且必世世代代變為荒涼， 永永遠遠無人經過。

en: But the hawk and the porcupine shall possess it, the owl and the raven shall dwell in it. He shall stretch the line of confusion over it, and the plumb line of emptiness.
zh: 但鵜鶘與箭豬要佔據那地， 貓頭鷹和烏鴉必住在其中。 耶和華必把混沌的準繩、 空虛的線鉈，拉在其上。

en: Its nobles- there is no one there to call it a kingdom, and all its princes shall be nothing.
zh: 它的顯貴一個也沒有了， 以致不能稱為一國， 所有的領袖也沒有了。

en: Thorns shall grow over its strongholds, nettles and thistles in its fortresses. It shall be the haunt of jackals, an abode for ostriches.
zh: 以東的宮殿必長荊棘， 它的堡壘必長蒺藜和刺草； 它要作野狗的住處， 作鴕鳥的居所。

en: And wild animals shall meet with hyenas; the wild goat shall cry to his fellow; indeed, there the night bird settles and finds for herself a resting place.
zh: 曠野的走獸必與豺狼相遇， 野山羊必呼喊牠的同伴； 連夜間的怪物也必在那裡棲身， 為自己尋找休息的地方。

en: There the owl nests and lays and hatches and gathers her young in her shadow; indeed, there the hawks are gathered, each one with her mate.
zh: 箭蛇要在那裡築窩、下蛋、 孵蛋，並且聚子在牠的陰影下； 鷂鷹也各與自己的伴偶， 聚集在那裡。

en: Seek and read from the book of the LORD: Not one of these shall be missing; none shall be without her mate. For the mouth of the LORD has commanded, and his Spirit has gathered them.
zh: 你們要查考和閱讀耶和華的書卷； 這些都無一缺少， 也沒有一個是沒有伴偶的， 因為他的口 已吩咐了， 他的靈已把牠們聚集。

en: He has cast the lot for them; his hand has portioned it out to them with the line; they shall possess it forever; from generation to generation they shall dwell in it.
zh: 他也為牠們抽籤， 他的手用準繩給牠們分地； 牠們必永遠得著那地， 也要世世代代住在其中。
